name: bluerock
description: The plugin behind BlueRock for Builders (builders.bluerock.io). The run-as-is core for your AI Work Hub: it gets to know you, tracks today's priorities, wraps up your sessions into a dashboard, and points a fast Account Scorecard team at any company. Your Hub comes seeded with more agents and skills you own and edit. Drive it in plain language, or with commands like /check (full name /bluerock:check).
